case_title: SOLOMON GRABOVSKIY VS. YERDES M NELSON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-01-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-17-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRABOVSKIY, SOLOMON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NELSON, YERDES M $1,585.00 PRINCIPAL, $494.53 INTEREST, $119.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,199.03 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-27-2008 IS CONTINUED TO OCT-30-2008 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BENCH LETTER IS WITHDRAWN. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER EXAMINATION.

"REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE WILL BE HEARD & DETERMINED AT TIME OF REGULAR SCHEDULED TRIAL", PER COMMISSIONER'S ORDER DATED MARCH 25, 2008.

DENNIS NELSON ORDERED TO APPEAR TO TESTIFY CONCERNING ASSETS OR OTHER PROPERTY OF THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
